feedback.text: Google is planning on not allowing "side-loading", otherwise known as installing applications from third-party applications that have not been directly authorised through the Google Play Store. This harms competition and means the only reasonable and accessible place to install applications is through Google themselves, who will become a monopoly and not allowing choice in the smartphone / Android ecosystem on our own personal devices that we spend hundreds of thousands of £//$ on totally removes the control of consumers in their own products - thank you for reading :)
